title: RandomControlFork
description: Continued fork of the RandomControl plugin, allowing for the return of RNG Manipulation to PaperMC servers.
body:
Lets you manipulate RNG on Paper _(and forks)_. No config, straightforward plugin.

Designed for use and tested with Earthcomputer's enchantment manipulator. However, should work with anything else abusing entity RNG.

**Does not currently work with fishing manipulation** (`/cfish`)

## This is a fork!

This plugin is continued from e-im's version of RandomControl. This plugin was out of date for the latest versions of the game, and hadn't been updated in 2 years. I decided to fork it myself and add a few lines of code to update it to the latest version! 

This is my first public project, so report any issues on my github!

Original Project:
- [Github](https://github.com/e-im/RandomControl)
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/randomcontrol)

All credit goes towards e-im for the original plugin.

My Github: [Plugin Github](https://github.com/lostsucks/RandomControl)
